song.title: Though I Don’t Know
song.author: John Berglund
song.lyrics: [V1] .D Though I don’t know .A All that lies before me .Bm Yet I’m certain .G D That the way will be . Along the path that .A Leads into that glory|| .Bm G Where He will be .D A Waiting for me, .Bm G As I run He will carry me… .D A Lord, as I run to the end . G D You must carry me.
